title: Quest Food Processor, 6-in-1 Chopper, Blender, Grinder, 2 Litre Bowl, 3 Speeds + Pulse, Dishwasher Safe, 600W
features: EASY FOOD PREP – Use this Food Processor to chop, blend, grind, slice, shred, or knead all different kinds of foods! Featuring 3 different speed settings as well as a pulse setting, the powerful 600W motor inside will ensure food is prepared precisely and quickly.

LARGE CAPACITY – The processor features a 2 Litre capacity bowl, with measurements indicated on the exterior of the glass, up to a maximum working capacity of 1.5 litres. The bowl features a handle to allow you to easily move any food once you’re done processing it.

ACCESSORIES INCLUDED – The processor comes with a variety of accessories, including chopping and dough blades, slicing, shredding and emulsifying discs, a spatula, and a pushing tool to ensure no food gets stuck. Each of these parts are also removable and dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

SAFE & CONVENIENT – Controlling the processor is easy – simply twist the knob to your desired setting, and its blue indicator light will let you know when the appliance is active. The food bowl has a double safety lock system, ensuring it does not come loose and no food gets out, preventing any mess. Its base features non-slip rubber feet for extra stability.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: From the brand Explore Quest Appliances We have a huge range of everything you need for your home & kitchen, from kettles & toasters, to air fryers, juicers, blenders & more. Previous page About Quest Quest Appliances is based in Liverpool, UK, and we have a full support team based in our Head Office. Product Safety and Certification. We have a dedicated product testing and quality team who rigorously test all of our products before we sell them. All of our products are certified to British safety and testing standards. Shop the Quest range Visit the store Coffee Machines Brew amazing cafe style coffee in the comfort of your own home. Grills We have a huge range of cooking appliances, including air fryers, grills, rice cookers, slow cookers, deep fryers and pancake makers. Food Prep Our food preparation range includes the very best and latest stand mixers, hand mixers, food choppers and electric knives. Air Fryers Air Fryers are the must have cooking appliance for your kitchen. Quest has a range of styles of Air Fryer to suit every family. Kettles & Toasters We have developed a range of kettles, toasters, and kettle & toaster sets, to suit every budget and with a range of colours to suit. Panini & Sandwich Makers Prepare healthy and delicious snacks with our range of panini makers and toasted sandwich machines. Next page
